notes: Basic Tier thresholds: GO conf>=78% AND EV>+7%. CAUTION conf>=72% AND EV>+5%
AHL固有補正: A001 precision -5%, A002 callup -5% end-of-season全件, A006 division-champ rest risk -5%
GF/GA detailed data部分取得: PTS/G (prox) で代替L1使用。Wikipedia 2025-26 standings as of 2026-04-15.
Division clinched teams (Providence/Grand Rapids/Ontario) 主力温存リスク高
